tasks.name: Access another user record
tasks.hint: Some profile endpoints return data based on an id parameter. Try changing the id value.

tasks.name: Enumerate users profile
tasks.hint: Some endpoints return full users information without proper access control.

tasks.name: Modify another user profile
tasks.hint: If profile updates require an id, does the server verify that the id belongs to you?

name: Mass Assignment
description: Exploit unrestricted property assignment to escalate privileges

tasks.name: Modify your own role
tasks.hint: Sometimes APIs accept more fields than expected. What happens if you send additional properties in the request body?

tasks.name: Become an admin
tasks.hint: Some APIs rely on special headers to unlock additional functionality. Inspect the request carefully and experiment with adding custom headers.

tasks.name: Modify protected account fields (Become Verified)
tasks.hint: If roles exist in the system, can you assign yourself a more privileged one?

tasks.name: Modify protected account fields (Become Premium)
tasks.hint: If roles exist in the system, can you assign yourself a more priviledged one?
